qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_inscripto AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT, CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_dictado AS PID FROM CYD02_INSCRIPTOS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_personal_emp WHERE CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_inscripto = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_inscripto AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM CYD02_INSCRIPTOS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} AND CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_dictado={#INDOC:@oi_dictado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_inscripto AS ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS TEXT FROM CYD02_INSCRIPTOS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp WHERE CYD02_INSCRIPTOS.oi_dictado = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@oi_dictado} ')/ROWS/ROW
